Information: This file provides default values for the deployment wizard inside Visual Studio and the AWS Lambda commands added to the .NET Core CLI.
Run 'dotnet lambda help' for available commands.
Run 'dotnet lambda package -c Release -o bin/Release/replog-api.zip' to produce a deployment artifact for the infra repo to consume.
When using AddAWSLambdaHosting (Amazon.Lambda.AspNetCoreServer.Hosting), the function handler is the assembly name only.
